## pf window activate-by

Bring a window to the foreground by title substring (case-insensitive, library-guaranteed)

```
pf window activate-by <pattern> [flags]
```

### Options

```
  -h, --help   help for activate-by
```

```
      --max-x int32   input coordinate space width (default 1920)
      --max-y int32   input coordinate space height (default 1080)
      --nested        auto-detect and connect to a nested Wayland session in /tmp
```
